<!--
Thanks for contributing! Keep the change focused and describe what and why.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for setup and the checks CI runs.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing behavior changes)
- [ ] Docs / chore (no runtime code change)

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123". Delete if none. -->

## How verified

<!-- How you confirmed it works — the flow you drove, sites tested, etc. -->

## Screenshots / recording

<!-- For UI changes, show before/after (light and dark if relevant). Delete if N/A. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `yarn type-check` passes
- [ ] `yarn lint` passes
- [ ] `yarn test` passes (new behavior has a test; bug fixes start with a failing test)
- [ ] `yarn build` succeeds
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or settings changed
- [ ] No unrelated changes bundled in
